title: MineCards
description: Adds collectible trading cards to minecraft!
body:
🎲 MineCards
-
🢂 Adds over 100 unique cards with their own individual art! Collect packs throughout the world by opening chests.

🢂 Available for multiple Minecraft versions

This datapack includes cross-datapack content with the following datapacks:
- [Sanguine](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sanguine)
- [Manic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/manic)

This content is entirely optional! It will not appear ingame without those datapacks installed. If you wish to use them together, load MineCards ABOVE these resource packs.


💡 Info & Help
-
🢂 Ask for help and report bugs in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EC5j5Z9bFW)
